title: satie-cross-modal: Biographically Anchored AI Translations of Erik Satie's Piano Works
description: A cross-modal AI framework that translates piano works by Erik Satie into period-faithful visual artworks. Combines CLAP audio embeddings, low-level acoustic descriptors via librosa, a handcrafted lexical bridge over four perceptual dimensions (palette, rhythm, surface, mood), and Stable Diffusion XL with IP-Adapter conditioned on curated fin-de-siècle Parisian visual references. Each piece is anchored to an editorial biographical phrase that situates the score within a moment of the composer's life. Released as the computational companion to the paper Sonorous Brushstrokes.

creators.name: Park, Eun Ji
creators.affiliation: Seoul National University, Department of Musicology
